identity.name: Colonel
identity.description: Multi-tenant accounting automation platform for processing high-volume financial data with military precision.

theme.background_strategy: Off-white (#F8FAFC) for app background, Pure White (#FFFFFF) for data panels.

mono.usage: SKUs, Transaction IDs, Financial Values, Code Snippets

dashboard_grid.rules: Maximize screen real estate. No large empty spaces in data views.

sidebar.style: Dark mode sidebar always (for contrast with light content area)

containers.card: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-lg shadow-sm

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-800 text-white shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-100 hover:text-slate-900 text-slate-600 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors

inputs.default: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-400 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-slate-950 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

tables.wrapper: relative w-full overflow-auto rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white
tables.header: h-10 px-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-slate-500 [&:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 bg-slate-50 sticky top-0 z-10 border-b border-slate-200 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider
tables.caption: mt-4 text-sm text-slate-500

cards.base: rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white text-slate-950 shadow-sm
cards.title: font-semibold leading-none tracking-tight

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-950 focus:ring-offset-2

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Manrope' or similar geometric sans.
Do NOT use gradients for text. It reduces readability in data apps.
Tables MUST have sticky headers for long lists.
Action buttons should be strictly hierarchical: Primary (Solid Dark), Secondary (Outline), Ghost (Text only).
All interactive elements MUST have a 'data-testid'.
Ensure high contrast for all text (WCAG AA compliance).
Dates: Use 'date-fns' for formatting (format: 'dd MMM yyyy').

instructions_to_main_agent.layout: Implement a 'DashboardLayout' component that handles the Sidebar and Header across all protected routes.
instructions_to_main_agent.tables: Create a reusable 'DataTable' component using '@tanstack/react-table' if complex sorting/filtering is needed, or simple table primitives for basic lists.
instructions_to_main_agent.auth: Login page should be simple, centered, with a professional monochromatic background.
instructions_to_main_agent.error_handling: Use a global Error Boundary and 404 page.
instructions_to_main_agent.file_structure: Keep pages in 'src/pages', components in 'src/components', and UI primitives in 'src/components/ui'.
